title: elaphoglossum andohahelense
intro: Elaphoglossum andohahelense is a species of fern native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Osmundaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Elaphoglossum andohahelense is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
